findings.blocker: Section-composite -> conjugateEquiv-component reframing: to apply conjugateEquiv.injective the whole gammaPushforwardTildeIso/restrictScalars-layered section-level LHS must first be recognized as a single conjugateEquiv(...) component. This reframing (recognising gammaPushforwardIso psi cross-layer as conjugateIsoEquiv adjL adjR) is the multi-iter stall; not a missing Mathlib lemma.

attempts.strategy: Build conjugate chain infra: conjPullbackFactor (def packaging leftAdjointCompIso of free legs) + conjPullbackFactor_eq_pullbackComp (= project pullbackComp via conj-0' pullbackComp_eq_leftAdjointCompIso)
attempts.code_tried: noncomputable def conjPullbackFactor ... := letI : Algebra ... ; change Adjunction.leftAdjointCompIso _ _ _ _ = _; exact (pullbackComp_eq_leftAdjointCompIso _ _).symm
attempts.lean_error: first cut: failed to synthesize Algebra R A (fixed by adding letI : Algebra (R) (A) := phi.hom.toAlgebra inside the type)
attempts.insight: leftAdjointCompIso factor needs explicit letI Algebra instances in the type signature; `change` (not `show`) avoids the show-linter warning when reducing to the leftAdjointCompIso head.

attempts.strategy: conj-1a/1b: base_change_mate_codomain_read_legs_param (read with pullback-comp factor abstracted as Pcomp arg) + _eq_param (original = param at pullbackComp by rfl) + conj-native read _conj + bridge _conj_eq (_conj = _legs)
attempts.insight: Abstracting the single pullback-composition factor as an explicit iso argument makes the original read recover by rfl, turning conj-1b into a 3-line rw bridge. This is the structural device that atomizes the obstruction.

attempts.strategy: conj-2c: bundle the three transparent pushforward Gamma-collapses (two pushforwardComp coherences -> id, pushforwardCongr -> eqToHom) into one conjunction over generic scheme morphisms
attempts.code_tried: base_change_mate_reindex_conj_pushforwardCollapse stated over composable a1 b1 a2 b2 and equal f=g; proved from gammaMap_pushforwardComp_{inv,hom}_eq_id + gammaMap_pushforwardCongr_hom
attempts.lean_error: first cut: failed to synthesize Algebra R A (fixed by restating fully abstractly over generic morphisms, instance-clean)
attempts.insight: Restating the collapse over generic scheme morphisms (not the concrete base-change legs) sidesteps the Algebra-instance synthesis failure and is instance-clean.

attempts.strategy: conj-2a keystone: statement = _legs reindex identity read against conj-native codomain read; subst hfst/hsnd to reduce to affine model, then conjugateEquiv.injective discharge
attempts.code_tried: intro g' f' hfst hsnd comm; subst hfst; subst hsnd; <reduction to affine model>; sorry
attempts.lean_error: no error; subst reduction lands but the section-level LHS cannot be reinterpreted as a single conjugateEquiv(...) component without the cross-layer gammaPushforwardIso psi = conjugateIsoEquiv reframing
attempts.insight: subst reduction to the affine model is in place; the residual is purely the reframing, which the explicit-factor/section route cannot express. Legs conj-2b (pullback) and conj-2d (cross-layer) cannot be typed until the conjugateEquiv normal form exists.

attempts.strategy: Make _legs a sorry-free thin wrapper over conj-2a via the conj-1b bridge
attempts.code_tried: exact base_change_mate_codomain_read_legs_conj_eq psi phi M g' f' hfst hsnd ▸ base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs_conj psi phi M g' f' hfst hsnd comm
attempts.insight: _legs body is now sorry-free but _legs is still TRANSITIVELY sorry-backed via conj-2a (lean_verify of base_change_mate_fstar_reindex_legs shows sorryAx). The sorry was atomized/relocated into the named conjugate identity, NOT eliminated. No axiom-clean progress on the crux -> tripwire fires.

next_steps: ABANDON conjugate route (tripwire fired: this round, the route's 6th iter at sorry=4, closed neither conj-2a nor gstar_transpose). iter-036 executes the pre-scheduled affine-local explicit-inverse + element-ext refactor (PROGRESS.md Iter-036 ramp). Keep conj-1a/1b/2c + param infra (axiom-clean, route-independent).

attempts.strategy: iSup_basicOpen_subtype_eq_top: cover members over a Finset subtype sup to top
attempts.code_tried: rw [iSup_subtype]; have h := (PrimeSpectrum.iSup_basicOpen_eq_top_iff' (s := (t:Set R))).mpr hspan; simpa using h
attempts.lean_error: first cut: Eq.trans type mismatch on iSup_congr route -> replaced with simpa
attempts.insight: simpa using the iff'.mpr is robust; the iSup_congr+symm.trans route mismatched the bundled-subtype iSup shape.

attempts.strategy: descent_smul_eq_zero (exists_of_eq engine): a global section vanishing on D(f) is killed by a power of f; per cover element exists_of_eq of Hfr + Finset.sup + separatedness
attempts.code_tried: term-mode .trans/congrArg chain; change g (f^(univ.sup k) • x) = g 0; rw [hzero, map_zero]
attempts.lean_error: repeated: rw [LinearMap.map_smul] / rw [res_comp] / rw [ms_i] fail to match ModuleCat.Hom.hom (.presheaf.map (homOfLE ...).op) coercion (elided homOfLE proofs defeat rw)
attempts.insight: Term-mode is the reliable pattern for ModuleCat sheaf-restriction: fully-applied LinearMap.map_smul g a x, res_comp F with explicit A B C, congrArg, .trans. rw on these coercions fails even on syntactically identical terms.

attempts.strategy: descent_overlap_agree + descent_surj: per-D(r) surjectivity with common power N, overlap agreement up to further power P via exists_of_eq, glue f^P-scaled family by existsUnique_gluing', conclude on D(f) by eq_of_locally_eq'
attempts.code_tried: have ms_i := LinearMap.map_smul (...).hom (f^P) (...); ... ((mul_smul (f^P) (f^N) _).symm.trans (congrArg (· • _) (pow_add f P N).symm)); choose p hp using hover; set P := Finset.univ.sup ...
attempts.lean_error: several smul-normalization mismatches (f^(N+P) vs f^(P+N), mul_smul vs pow_add) resolved by sed N+P->P+N and explicit congrArg (· • _) (pow_add ...).symm
attempts.insight: Power-of-f bookkeeping needs explicit pow_add/mul_smul term-mode reassociation; rw [← pow_add] leaves an unsolved (fun x => f^x) p redex. exists_of_eq returns c with c.2 = f^p; bridge via have hp' : f^p = (c:R) := hp.

attempts.strategy: Assemble keystone: IsLocalizedModule with map_units/surj/exists_of_eq fields
attempts.code_tried: surj y := obtain (x,n,hxn) := descent_surj ...; exact (...); exists_of_eq {x1 x2} h := descent_smul_eq_zero on (x1-x2)
attempts.lean_error: surj' is not a field of IsLocalizedModule -> renamed to surj
attempts.insight: IsLocalizedModule field is `surj` not `surj'`. Final lean_verify = {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}; full lake build of QuotScheme green (8317 jobs).

next_steps: Build the slice->Spec R_r section transport Γ((pullback (Opens.ι (q.X i))).obj M, ⊤) ≅ Γ(M, q.X i) + naturality in the open, chain through the two P1 pullbacks to land Hfr. findings.blocker: isProper reduced to the SINGLE obligation ValuativeCriterion.Existence (toSpecZ d r) (Nitsure chart-selection existence). That existence build needs E1 (chart factorization of Spec-of-local-ring through an open cover member — the primary missing Mathlib API), E2 (minimal-valuation selection), E3 entry-as-minor combinatorics, E4 lift construction.

attempts.strategy: isProper_of_valuativeExistence: bundle 3 cheap instances + IsProper.of_valuativeCriterion + ValuativeCriterion.iff
attempts.code_tried: apply IsProper.of_valuativeCriterion; exact ValuativeCriterion.iff.mpr ⟨hE, valuativeUniqueness_toSpecZ d r⟩
attempts.insight: Reduces blueprint keystone isProper to exactly ONE obligation hE = ValuativeCriterion.Existence. Mathlib's valuative criterion is over general valuation rings, not only DVRs — Nitsure works verbatim, no DVR reduction needed.

attempts.strategy: transitionPreMap_minorDet_mul: algebraic core of existence step E3 — minor-ratio identity θ̃(P^J_{K'})·P^I_J = P^I_{K'}
attempts.code_tried: transitionPreMap_minorDet + mul_submatrix_col + Matrix.det_mul to split det(universalMinorInv)·algebraMap(P^I_{K'}); det(universalMinorInv)·algebraMap(P^I_J)=det(universalMinorInv·universalMinor)=1 via universalMinorInv_mul_cancel.1; mul_assoc/mul_comm reassoc
attempts.insight: Generalises transitionPreMap_minorDet_swap_mul (K'=I case). Purely algebraic, abstract over any external K-point f, reuses existing matrix infra. Apply f' to it -> g(P^J_{K'}) = f(P^I_{K'})/f(P^I_J).

E2 minimal-valuation selection (medium, uses ValuationRing.valuation + Finset.max'), E3 entry-as-minor sign combinatorics (the one piece with no scaffold — standalone lemma on det of identity-with-one-column-replaced), E4 lift construction (medium).
